summary: Comprehensive testing of CloudDuka POS P0 features completed successfully. All features working: Login, Credit Customers, Stock Auto-Calculation, Credit Sales, Dashboard updates. Backend 100% pass rate (16/16 tests), Frontend 100% functional.

design_issues.issue: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies in ProductsPage.jsx and ReportsPage.jsx

Credit Customer Create - SUCCESS (Test Customer UI added)
Credit Customer List - SUCCESS (7 customers displayed)
Credit Customer in POS dropdown - SUCCESS (all customers visible with balances)
Stock Unit Auto-Calculation - SUCCESS (Packet: 5 packets × 10 units = 50 units auto-calculated)
Stock input locked when buying unit is Packet/Dozen - SUCCESS
Cost per unit auto-calculation - SUCCESS (400 ÷ 50 = Ksh 8)
Credit Sale Flow - SUCCESS (Milk 500ml sold on credit to John Doe)
Customer balance update after credit sale - SUCCESS (140 → 210 KES)
Product stock reduction after sale - SUCCESS (48 → 47 units)
Dashboard displays correct sales data - SUCCESS (Total: Ksh 2,710, Credit: KES 2,710)
Dashboard shows credit outstanding - SUCCESS (Ksh 2,210)
Credit Page shows all customers with correct balances - SUCCESS
Backend API: Auth login - SUCCESS
Backend API: Credit customers CRUD - SUCCESS
Backend API: Products CRUD - SUCCESS
Backend API: Sales with credit payment - SUCCESS
Backend API: Dashboard stats - SUCCESS
Backend API: Credit payment recording - SUCCESS
